entry.title: New IDC SS001760017 awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION for the amount of $500,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL::IGF MULTIPLE AWARD 10 YEAR (BASE AND OPTIONS) INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT FOR INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SUPPORT SERVICES TO ASSIST THE AGENCY OFFICE OF THE DEPUTY COMMISSIONER, SYSTEMS IN ITS EFFORTS TO PERFORM WORK REQUIRED TO ENSURE THAT ONGOING SUPPORT TO THE AGENCY PROGRAMMATIC, ADMINISTRATIVE, AND MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEMS NEEDS ARE MET. CONTRACTOR SERVICES NEEDED TO ADDRESS AGENCY STRATEGIC PLAN AND INFORMATION RESOURCES MANAGEMENT STRATEGIC PLAN GOALS AND OBJECTIVES AND TO ASSIST THE AGENCY IN DEVELOPING THE SYSTEMS TO SUPPORT THE AGENCY. ORDERING PERIOD, INCLUSIVE OF ALL OPTIONS (IF EXERCISED), IS AUGUST 21, 2017 THROUGH SEPTEMBER 28, 2026.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SS001760017 (P00001) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION I ORDERING PERIOD AND UPDATE CLAUSES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SS001760017 (P00003) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CL::IGF
MODIFICATION TO CHANGE THE KEY PERSON IDENTIFIED FOR THE BUSINESS OPERATIONS SPECIALIST LEVEL 3 LABOR CATEGORY, REVISE THE AGENCY SPECIFIC CLAUSE FOR INVOICE SUBMISSION AND PAYMENT RELATED INFORMATION WITH THE DEC 2018 VERSION; AND INCLUDE A CHECK-OFF FOR FAR CLAUSE 52.242-5

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
